types.name: DimensionEndPointSizeType
types.summary: The DimensionEndPointSizeType enum defines the dimension end point size types. The size can be dynamic or fixed.

enum_values.name: Dynamic
enum_values.summary: The size is based on the dimension value of the associated measurement graphic.

enum_values.name: FixedExtraSmall
enum_values.summary: The size is extra small. The size does not depend on the dimension value.

enum_values.name: FixedSmall
enum_values.summary: The size is small. The size does not depend on the dimension value.

enum_values.name: FixedMedium
enum_values.summary: The size is medium. The size does not depend on the dimension value.

enum_values.name: FixedLarge
enum_values.summary: The size is large. The size does not depend on the dimension value.

enum_values.name: FixedExtraLarge
enum_values.summary: The size is extra large. The size does not depend on the dimension value.

types.name: DragEventArgs
types.summary: Contains the event arguments for a drag event on a handle.

properties.name: DeltaTranslation
properties.summary: Gets a vector indicating the translation since the last drag event.

properties.name: Interrupted
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the event arg was interrupted.

properties.name: StartPosition
properties.summary: Gets a point indicating the original position of the handle before the drag event. Property returns middle point in case of LineHandler.

properties.name: TotalTranslation
properties.summary: Gets a vector indicating the total translation since the drag started.

types.name: HandleEffectType
types.summary: Defines what the effect of a handle is.

enum_values.name: Geometry
enum_values.summary: The handle modifies the geometry by changing input points.

enum_values.name: Property
enum_values.summary: The handle modifies any object properties, or the handle modifies both object properties and input points.

enum_values.name: Addition
enum_values.summary: The handle makes additions to the geometry when clicked.

types.name: HandleLocationType
types.summary: Defines a handle by where it is located.
types.remarks: The choice of location type may affect the appearance of the handle.

enum_values.name: InputPoint
enum_values.summary: The handle is located on top of an object's input point.

enum_values.name: MidPoint
enum_values.summary: The handle is located at the exact midpoint of an edge or face.

enum_values.name: EndPoint
enum_values.summary: The handle is located at one end of an open shape.

enum_values.name: PointExtension
enum_values.summary: The handle extends the clickable area of a point.

enum_values.name: Other
enum_values.summary: The handle is located at another location.

enum_values.name: First
enum_values.summary: The handle is the first defining an open shape.

enum_values.name: Last
enum_values.summary: The handle is the last defining an open shape.

types.name: LineHandle
types.summary: Represents a handle that is represented as a line segment on the model.

properties.name: Line
properties.summary: Gets the segment that the handle represents.

types.name: PointHandle
types.summary: Represents a handle that is represented as a point on the model.

properties.name: Point
properties.summary: Gets the segment that the handle represents.

types.name: PolycurveHandle
types.summary: Represents a handle that is represented as a polycurve on the model.
types.remarks:
It is advisable to use simpler handles when possible (for example, a LineHandle) since they are
more lightweight.

properties.name: Polycurve
properties.summary: Gets the polycurve that the handle represents.

types.name: PolygonalSurfaceHandle
types.summary: Represents a handle that is represented as a polygonal surface on the model.

properties.name: Contour
properties.summary: Gets the contour of the surface that the handle represents.
properties.remarks:
If the contour is set, the minimum number of points is 3 and all of the points must be contained in the
same plane.

types.name: SelectionEventArgs
types.summary: Contains the event arguments for a drag event on a handle.

properties.name: HitPosition
properties.summary: Gets a point indicating the position of the handle.

properties.name: State
properties.summary: Gets a value of the selection state.

types.name: LineType
types.summary: The LineType enum defines what a line or curve represents. This will affect the line color and width.

enum_values.name: GeometryPreview
enum_values.summary: The line is a representation of the final result after the modification. This could be for example an edge or a mid-line of a solid resulting from the modification.

enum_values.name: Error
enum_values.summary: The line represents an error.

enum_values.name: Highlight
enum_values.summary: The line is highlighted in the model.

types.name: SurfaceType
types.summary: The SurfaceType enum defines what the surface represents.

enum_values.name: GeometryPreview
enum_values.summary: The surface is a representation of the final result after the modification. This could be for example one or more surfaces of the solid resulting from the modification.

enum_values.name: Highlight
enum_values.summary: The surface is highlighted in the model.

types.name: TextRepresentationTypes
types.summary: The TextRepresentationTypes enum defines what a text represents. This affects the text color, size and formatting in a way that is then consistent in the GUI.

enum_values.name: Label
enum_values.summary: The text represents a label for an object.

enum_values.name: Measurement
enum_values.summary: The text represents a measurement.

enum_values.name: Angle
enum_values.summary: The text represents an angle.

enum_values.name: Message
enum_values.summary: The text is a message for the user.

enum_values.name: Warning
enum_values.summary: The text is a warning to the user.

enum_values.name: Debug
enum_values.summary: The text is intended for debug purposes.

enum_values.name: Interactive
enum_values.summary: The text is interactive.
